name: Hummus (Makes 2 Cups)
recipeIngredient: Garbanzo beans, 15 oz (Can), drained and liquid reserved
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the bean liquid, sesame seeds, and garlic until well mixed.
2. Add the beans, lemon juice, and salt to the blender. Cover and blend on high, scraping the sides if needed, until smooth.
3. Garnish with parsley.
4. Serve with vegetables or as a spread in pita bread. It can also be used as a dip for falafel.
